steps.title: Identify the key comparison
steps.content: The phrase “still lower than” signals that the answer must be a volcano with a higher deformation rate than Sierra Negra.

steps.title: Match the rates to the requirement
steps.content: Pacaya shows 3.4 centimeters per month—the only rate exceeding Sierra Negra's 2.9. The other three volcanoes all fall below Sierra Negra. That confirms B is correct.
